title: Shri Radha Rani Ji Ki Aarti
intro: Read Shri Radha Rani Ji Ki Aarti in Hindi and seek the divine blessings of Shri Radha Rani.
description:
Aarti Shri Vrishabhanusuta ki, Manju murti Mohan mamta ki.
॥ Aarti Shri Vrishabhanusuta ki... ॥

Trividh tapayut sansriti nashini, Vimal vivek virag vikashini.
Pavan prabhu pad preeti prakashini, Sundartam chhavi sundarta ki॥
॥ Aarti Shri Vrishabhanusuta ki... ॥

Muni man Mohan Mohan mohani, Madhur manohar murti sohani.
Aviral prem amiya ras dohani, Priya ati sada sakhi Lalita ki॥
॥ Aarti Shri Vrishabhanusuta ki... ॥

Santat sevya sat muni janki, Aakar amit divyagun ganki.
Aakarshini Krishna tan manki, Ati amulya sampati samta ki॥
॥ Aarti Shri Vrishabhanusuta ki... ॥

Krishnatmika, Krishna sahacharini, Chinmay-vrinda vipin viharini.
Jagajjanani jag dukh nivarini, Aadi anadi shakti vibhuta ki॥
॥ Aarti Shri Vrishabhanusuta ki... ॥

faq.q1: What is the significance of Radha Rani's Aarti?
faq.a1: It is performed to seek pure devotion, selfless love, surrender, and the grace of Shri Krishna.
faq.q2: Which is the most auspicious day for worshipping Radha Rani?
faq.a2: Radhashtami is the most auspicious day; apart from that, Friday is also considered very favorable.
faq.q3: What offerings (Prasad) are preferred for Radha Rani during Aarti?
faq.a3: She is fond of Makhan (fresh butter), Mishri (sugar candy), sweets, Kheer, and fresh flowers (especially lotus).
faq.q4: Can Radha Rani's Aarti be performed at home?
faq.a4: Yes, it can be performed in the home temple before her idol or picture with full devotion.
faq.q5: What should be done after the Aarti for peace of mind?
faq.a5: Chanting the 'Radhe-Radhe' mantra and sitting in meditation after the Aarti is extremely blissful and peaceful.
